$comment: Curated India-first merchant catalogue. Each entry maps a normalized merchant string (lowercase, ASCII) to one of the 23 categories in packages/shared/src/categories.ts. The 'match' field is one of: contains | startsWith | exact | regex. Patterns are matched against the output of services/transactions/normalize.ts, so they should already be lowercase and stripped of UPI rails. Order does not matter — startsWith / exact wins over contains automatically in the resolver.

merchants.$section: Indian dishes & regional meals — generic food vocabulary. Matched as whole WORDS (match=keyword), the lowest-priority tier, so any specific brand above (contains/startsWith/exact) always wins. A food dish must NEVER fall to Other.
Quick bites, street food & chaat → Fast Food (keyword tier).
Common service vocabulary across categories (keyword tier).
